name: noidear
description: noidear food safety and quality management platform

scripts.build:server: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w server
scripts.verify: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.verify:full: npm run lint:api-prefix && npm run typecheck:types && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.verify:full:ci: npm run verify:full && npm run security:audit:strict && npm run test -w server -- --runInBand && npm run test -w client && python3 tools/generate-system-map.py
